pos_examples: Now, release reservation of service dependency kumquat for release instance socket.
Once you are done, please authorize rollback template fire for cross-variant rollback from canary release variant bastion to full release variant star_213.

First, execute deployment of release instance socket to deployment target object_50 using infrastructure component roof_11 and infrastructure resource dress_red and then finalize canary release for release instance socket.
The next step is to reserve component object_260 for release instance socket.
